title: wikstroemia uva-ursi var. buxifolia
intro: Wikstroemia uva-ursi var. buxifolia, also known as Buxiform Wikstroemia, is a plant species within the family Thymelaeaceae. This plant is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include astringent, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Wikstroemia uva-ursi var. buxifolia include its ability to treat urinary tract infections, reduce inflammation, and act as an antiseptic. In herbal preparations, the plant is often dried and made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
